name: Distributive Fairness
description: Equitable compensation relative to company profitability and industry standards

name: Procedural Justice
description: Fair and transparent negotiation process with equal voice for all parties

name: Good Faith Bargaining
description: Honest and sincere engagement without intent to deceive or obstruct

name: Dignity and Respect
description: Treating all parties with respect regardless of power differences

name: Transparency
description: Open sharing of relevant information to enable informed decisions

name: Efficiency
description: Timely resolution that minimizes disruption and resource consumption

name: Hierarchy Respect
description: Acknowledging and working within organizational authority structures

name: Solidarity
description: Unity and mutual support among workers and union members

name: Confidentiality
description: Protecting sensitive information shared during negotiations

name: Sustainability
description: Creating durable agreements that serve long-term interests of all parties

name: Worker Safety
description: Prioritizing physical and psychological wellbeing of employees

name: Financial Responsibility
description: Ensuring economic viability and fiscal prudence in agreements
